final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial nature photography, landscape
Primary request: ancient primeval forest at dawn with sunbeams piercing through dense canopy, creating dramatic crepuscular rays
Scene/backdrop: deep virgin forest interior, moss-covered ancient boulders, distant mountain silhouettes, winding clear mountain stream
Subject: towering redwood trunks reaching skyward, foreground ferns and wild mushrooms, lush green vegetation reflections in water
Style/medium: nature photography, wide-angle landscape
Composition/framing: wide-angle shot with pronounced depth of field, foreground-to-background layering
Lighting/mood: early morning golden hour, volumetric god rays through canopy, soft mist floating between trees, mysterious and serene atmosphere
Color palette: deep forest green + emerald green + golden sunlight + mossy earth tones
Materials/textures: velvety moss on weathered stone, delicate fern fronds, smooth water surface with reflections, rough bark texture
Constraints: maintain layered depth from foreground mushrooms to background mountains, preserve the ethereal quality of morning light beams
Avoid: oversaturated colors, artificial lighting, human elements, wildlife, plastic textures, deformed vegetation
